input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.3.2
            TITLE: the bse must be able to be checked during technical inspection by having one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.3.2: The BSE must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of:
T.4.3.2 The BSE must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of: 
• A separate detachable connector(s) for any BSE signal(s) to the main ECU without 
affecting any other connections  
• An inline switchable breakout box available that allows disconnection of each BSE 
signal(s) to the main ECU without affecting any other connections

final_answer: rule T.4.3.2: The BSE must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of: T.4.3.2 The BSE must be able to be checked during Technical Inspection by having one of: • A separate detachable connector(s) for any BSE signal(s) to the main ECU without affecting any other connections • An inline switchable breakout box available that allows disconnection of each BSE signal(s) to the main ECU without affecting any other connections
